title: FDB (Legal and Local Board Policy)
description: This policy governs student admissions and enrollment for the school district, covering the rules and processes for enrolling children in district schools. It applies to all families seeking to enroll students, as well as district staff who manage the enrollment process. Understanding this policy helps parents know their rights and the steps required to get their child enrolled in the appropriate school.

timeline_local.summary: This is not a policy change item. The board is receiving an informational presentation from Zonda Demographics on district and campus future enrollment projections. The demographic study covers current home building, development growth, and campus enrollment trend projections over the next ten years. No board action is required. Policy FDB is cited as a reference only.
timeline_local.discussion:
policy EFB criteria
- Requested the board vote to establish a **library advisory council** at the next meeting
timeline_local.notes: This page is a board agenda item cover sheet, not a redline policy document. There are no proposed changes to Policy FDB. The policy is referenced only as the governing authority related to this informational item. No policy language additions or deletions are present.
